signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February, but below market forecasts of 2.4%; this was confirmed in the official Consumer Price Index release on April 2, 2026, by Statistics Korea[2][7][8]. signals.headline: Ethereum Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase Amid Price Surge and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase Amid Price Surge and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
